title: andrographis serpyllifolia
intro: Andrographis serpyllifolia, also known as Himalayan king of bitters, is a plant species in the family Acanthaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Andrographis serpyllifolia include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or tinctures for use in traditional medicine.
